nodes.description: Modeler Water Mesh Actor

nodes.label: SequenceRecorderGroup
nodes.description: Sequence Recorder Group

nodes.label: DrawFrustumComponent
nodes.description: Utility component for drawing a view frustum. Origin is at the component location, frustum points down position X axis.

nodes.label: UINavigationAction
nodes.description: Generic UI navigation action that are usually bound to a gamepad or other input device

nodes.label: LiveLinkVirtualSubject
nodes.description: A Virtual subject is made up of one or more real subjects from a source

nodes.label: MovieSceneBaseCacheParams
nodes.description: Base class for the cache parameters that will be used in all the cache sections

nodes.label: LidarClippingVolume
nodes.description: Lidar Clipping Volume

nodes.label: CoverRealTimeVideoStyle
nodes.description: Cover Real Time Video Style

nodes.label: PrecomputedVisibilityVolume
nodes.description: Precomputed Visibility Volume

nodes.label: PCGMetadataMakeVector3
nodes.description: EPCGMetadata Make Vector 3

nodes.label: OpenCVArucoDictionarySize
nodes.description: EOpen CVAruco Dictionary Size

nodes.label: GeometryCollection
nodes.description: UGeometryCollectionObject (UObject). UObject wrapper for the FGeometryCollection

nodes.label: TakeRecorderUserSettings
nodes.description: Universal take recorder settings that apply to a whole take

nodes.label: MovieGraphCollectionNode
nodes.description: A collection node specifies an interface for doing dynamic scene queries for actors in the world. Collections work in tandem with UMovieGraphModifiers to select which actors the modifiers should be run on.

nodes.label: RigUnit_GetControlBool
nodes.description: GetControlBool is used to retrieve a single Bool from a hierarchy.

nodes.label: MaterialExpressionFloatToUInt
nodes.description: Material Expression Float to UInt

nodes.label: FoliageTypeObject
nodes.description: A wrapper struct used to allow the use of either FoliageType assets or FoliageType blueprint classes

nodes.label: FZoneShapeType
nodes.description: FZone Shape Type

nodes.label: EarthRoadNetPrefab
nodes.description: Earth Road Net Prefab

nodes.label: SubmixEffectStereoToQuadPreset
nodes.description: Submix effect which sends stereo audio to quad (left surround and right surround) if the channel count is greater than 2.

nodes.label: ACCEPT
nodes.description: Accept, normally acts like a mouse click. Corresponds to Virtual_Accept key

nodes.label: BACK
nodes.description: Back/Cancel, normally acts like escape. Corresponds to Virtual_Back key

nodes.label: INVALID
nodes.description: Invalid action

nodes.label: POLYGON
nodes.description: Bezier spline shape

nodes.label: bindings
nodes.description: Array of binding descriptions. This is fixed and used by GetComponentBindings() to resolve final bindings for a given context.

nodes.label: frame_translators
nodes.description: List of available translator the subject can use.

nodes.label: rebroadcast_subject
nodes.description: If enabled, rebroadcast this subject

nodes.label: subjects
nodes.description: Names of the real subjects to combine into a virtual subject

nodes.label: end_frame_offset
nodes.description: The offset into the end of the animation clip

nodes.label: first_loop_start_frame_offset
nodes.description: The offset for the first loop of the animation clip

nodes.label: play_rate
nodes.description: The playback rate of the animation clip

nodes.label: reverse
nodes.description: Reverse the playback of the animation clip

nodes.label: start_frame_offset
nodes.description: The offset into the beginning of the animation clip

nodes.label: mode
nodes.description: Affects how this volume affects points

nodes.label: priority
nodes.description: Determines the processing order of the nodes, in case they overlap. Higher values take priority over lower ones.

nodes.label: preset_save_dir
nodes.description: The default location in which to save take presets

nodes.label: settings
nodes.description: User settings that should be passed to a recorder instance

nodes.label: collection
nodes.description: The collection is customized in the details panel, so the override should always be enabled

nodes.label: dynamic_properties
nodes.description: Properties which can be dynamically declared on the node (vs. native properties which are always present).

nodes.label: script_tags
nodes.description: Tags that can be used to identify this node within a pre/post render script. Tags can be unique in order to identify this specific node, or the same tag can be applied to multiple nodes in order to identify a grouping of nodes.

nodes.label: bool_value
nodes.description: The current bool of the given bone - or identity in case it wasn't found.

nodes.label: control
nodes.description: The name of the Control to retrieve the bool for.

nodes.label: desc
nodes.description: A description that level designers can add (shows in the material editor UI).

nodes.label: foliage_type_object
nodes.description: The foliage type that will be spawned by the procedural foliage simulation

nodes.label: fragments
nodes.description: 片段数据，结构相同的片段有且仅有一份，不建议在非游戏线程中使用

nodes.label: frustum_enabled
nodes.description: Enable or disable frustum visualization for this camera

nodes.label: frustum_color
nodes.description: Color to draw the wireframe frustum.

nodes.label: frustum_angle
nodes.description: Angle of longest dimension of view shape. If the angle is 0 then an orthographic projection is used

nodes.label: frustum_aspect_ratio
nodes.description: Ratio of horizontal size over vertical size.

nodes.label: frustum_start_dist
nodes.description: Distance from origin to start drawing the frustum.

nodes.label: frustum_end_dist
nodes.description: Distance from origin to stop drawing the frustum.

nodes.label: texture
nodes.description: optional texture to show on the near plane

nodes.label: damage_model
nodes.description: Damage model to use for evaluating destruction.

nodes.label: enable_nanite
nodes.description: Enable support for Nanite.

nodes.label: mass
nodes.description: Total Mass of Collection. If density, units are in kg/m^3 ( only enabled if physics material is not set )

nodes.label: set_settings
nodes.description: Set all tap delay settings. This will replace any dynamically added or modified taps.

nodes.label: set_enable_nanite
nodes.description: Set Enable Nanite

nodes.label: set_convert_vertex_colors_to_srgb
nodes.description: Set Convert Vertex Colors to SRGB

nodes.label: has_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Checks whether or not an instance of the provided AssetUserData class is contained.

nodes.label: get_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Returns an instance of the provided AssetUserData class if it's contained in the target asset.

nodes.label: add_asset_user_data_of_class
nodes.description: Creates and adds an instance of the provided AssetUserData class to the target asset.

hyperedges.description: Classes defined in the Engine module
GeometryCollection and its properties and methods
DrawFrustumComponent and its frustum visualization properties
ControlRig unit for boolean control retrieval
Audio submix effect for stereo to quad conversion
